application: 2H engine cooling hose route between rubber hose sections
nominal_dimensions_mm: Orderable tube blank length is 750 mm minimum before bending/trimming; overall shape and bend clocking from selected photos; working visible envelope is roughly 400 mm vertical height and 250-300 mm upper offset from tape references; final centerline length, tube OD, wall, bend radii, and end bead positions are HOLD dimensions
material: Mild steel/aluminized steel or 304 stainless tube compatible with coolant; wall 1.2-1.6 mm after fabricator confirmation; corrosion protect external surface
tolerance: OD to hose fit +0.0/-0.5 after caliper confirmation; centerline length +/-2.0; bend clock +/-2 deg; bead height 1.5-2.0
fabrication_method: Use a 750 mm minimum tube blank and the original pipe as the master template; mandrel-bend matching tube where possible; otherwise cut/weld only with smooth internal transitions; add rolled/beaded hose-retention ends; deburr; clean internally; pressure-test before paint
hold_points: Measure final centerline length, actual hose ID and pipe OD with calipers; confirm wall thickness; confirm both end bead/flare style; confirm clamp-land length; mark bend centerlines and clocking from the physical sample; dry-fit on engine/radiator before coating; pressure-test with coolant-compatible caps
notes: 750 mm is the orderable blank allowance, not the final cut length. Photos are sufficient to submit the sample set and request a quote/template, but not enough for final production without the physical pipe and vehicle dry-fit.

part_name: Formed coolant pipe rubber connector/coupler hoses
application: Short rubber connector hoses on CP-2H-COOLANT-001 pipe ends
nominal_dimensions_mm: Local stock request is 2 x 500 mm EPDM radiator hose blanks, working ID 28-30 mm until pipe-end and mating-spigot ODs are measured; cut each connector from the old coupler sample; record hose overlap, clamp land, clamp band width, hose OD, bend/offset, and kink clearance in mm
material: EPDM coolant hose SAE J20R3/J20R4 or molded coolant equivalent; new smooth-band or constant-tension clamps
tolerance: Hose ID matched to measured OD with normal coolant-hose interference; no visible kink/ovality at installed bend; clamp lands fully covered without clamp cutting hose
fabrication_method: Keep old rubber couplers with the pipe sample; buy 2 x 500 mm straight EPDM blanks only if dry-fit remains round; otherwise sample-match molded connectors
hold_points: Measure connector A and B free/cut length, ID, OD, pipe-end OD and bead, mating spigot OD, overlap, clamp band width, bend/kink clearance, and heat/chafe exposure in mm
notes: Added after rubber visual audit so connector hoses are not buried under the metal pipe fabrication item. Linked order lines: RPO-COOL-006A and RPO-COOL-006B.
